Notice Of Motion And Motion To Lift Stay
Off Calendar Dec-08-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Matthew Peters and Jesse Miller of Reed Smith LLP telephone number 415-659-5973 for Plaintiff.
Douglas Winthrop of Arnold & Porter LLP telephone number 415-471-3174 for Defendant.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court confirmed and modified its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF AMTRUST NORTH AMERICA, INC'S Motion To Lift Stay is granted with the one exception that the order needs to say that the alternative relief sought by the petition to correct is now withdrawn. Now that the arbitrator has issued a final arbitration award, the stay is no longer needed and is dissolved. Lifting the stay does not frustrate the arbitrator's jurisdiction. The pendency of the motion to confirm the arbitration award is not in and of itself sufficient to delay plaintiff's ability to prosecute whatever claims it has remaining. The prevailing party is to provide a form of order and comply with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489. (302/HK)

Notice And (1) Petition To Compel Arbitration And (2) Motion For Stay Pending Arbitration
Off Calendar Mar-02-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JESSE L. MILLER & ATTY. MATTHEW T. PETERS OF REED SMITH LLP, TEL. NO. 659-5973 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. DOUGLAS A. WINTHROP & ATTY. ANTON A. WARE OF THE ARNOLD & PORTER LLP, TEL. NO. 471-3174 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT SQUARETRADE, INCORPORATED'S (1) Petition To Compel Arbitration And (2) Motion For Stay Pending Arbitration - The motion to compel arbitration and stay is granted. Plaintiff is correct that the arbitration clause is narrow and the pending arbitration only pertains to 11 claims. Plaintiff's complaint, however, is pleaded so generally that it also includes those arbitrable claims. The court grants this motion and stays the action because the same claims are implicated. The stay will not unduly prejudice the plaintiff. The arbitration agreement provides for an expedited arbitration. In addition, resolution of the arbitration may have ripple effects on this case and help lead to a quicker resolution of the court action. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sara Lerschen, CSR #6213 =302/ehg
